race.comment: TAGA SMILE (12) returns after five months in the paddock. Back for her third prep and expected to have developed further. Primed for this with the two trials and finds a winnable contest. FOXY ARTIST (5) another who resumes from a six month break. Had mixed fortunes in his two career starts from wide gates last September. Fitted with the one 900m trial placing from the inside barrier. Leading top-three contender. IVANTHEINVINCIBLE (6) Russian Revolution gelding from Empress Matilda on debut for the Matt Dunn yard. Improved at his last two trials and should be forward enough for this. EXO MURANO (4) Gelding by Graff from Mikuro on debut. Placed in a recent trial. Watch for any market confidence.
